name: CertainLogic Onboarding Wizard
description: Automated onboarding for OpenClaw. Scans environment, detects installed skills, recommends personalized starter stack from CertainLogic + verified community skills. Generates install checklist — you run commands manually.
author: CertainLogic

commands.name: start
commands.description: Run full onboarding with environment scan + recommendations

args.name: goal
args.description: Your goal (developer, business, research, productivity, beginner)

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Environment scan only — show what you already have
